task: I need to send a message to my supervisor about missing part of a shift because of a practical issue. Can you help me put together a clear note for that?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a clear, professional note you can send:

**Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I wanted to let you know that I’m dealing with a practical issue and may miss part of my shift tomorrow. I’m working on resolving it as quickly as possible and wanted to give you notice as early as I could. Please let me know if you need any more information.**

If you want, I can also make it:
- more formal,
- shorter/text-message style, or
- more specific to your situation without oversharing.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, but it needs to sound more real. I’d say something like:

Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I need to let you know I may miss part of my shift tomorrow because of a car problem I have to handle. I’m trying to get it sorted as fast as I can. I wanted to give you notice ahead of time so you can plan. I’ll update you as soon as I know more.

Keep it plain. Not too wordy.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a plain, natural version:

**Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I need to let you know I may miss part of my shift tomorrow because of a car issue I need to take care of. I’m working on getting it handled as quickly as I can. I wanted to give you notice ahead of time so you can plan. I’ll update you as soon as I know more.**

If you want, I can make it even shorter and more text-like.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Plain enough, sounds real.
